headline: Electronic Arts Unveils New Advertising Platform for In-Game Brand Activations (EA)
summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) has introduced EA Advertising, a new platform designed to allow brands to connect directly with players through integrated advertising experiences across the company’s gaming ecosystem.

raw.headline: Electronic Arts Unveils New Advertising Platform for In-Game Brand Activations (EA)
raw.summary: Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ:EA) has introduced EA Advertising, a new platform designed to allow brands to connect directly with players through integrated advertising experiences across the company’s gaming ecosystem.

headline: Electronic Arts Introduces EA Advertising, Launching Brands Directly Into Gameplay and Live Experiences
summary: REDWOOD CITY, Calif., June 15, 2026--Electronic Arts Inc. (NASDAQ: EA), the global leader in interactive entertainment, today announced the launch of EA Advertising, a new platform transforming how brands connect with audiences through digital and real-world experiences across its global portfolio of games.

headline: Electronic Arts launches EA Advertising, a new way for brands to advertise 'directly into gameplay'
summary: Electronic Arts announced EA Advertising, a new way for brands to connect with fans through its portfolio of games, from stadium signs to custom content.

headline: Electronic Arts Launches EA Advertising To Insert Brands Directly Into Gameplay and Live Experiences
summary: EA sits at the intersection of entertainment, sports, technology, music, and culture. Across console, mobile, and PC, our games and services reached more than 120 million players1 each month during fiscal year 2026.
